data.title: Russia cuts rates with one hand and fights sanctions with the other
data.description:
Russia’s central bank cut its benchmark interest rate by one percentage point to 17% on Friday, seeking to support the economy as growth slows and war costs widen the deficit. The step reverses part of the emergency tightening that took the key rate to 21% to fight inflation. Officials moved after complaints from business leaders […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/russia-cuts-rates-with-one-hand-and-fights-sanctions-with-the-other/

data.title: Polymarket integrates Chainlink to launch 15-minute prediction markets on Polygon
data.description:
Polymarket, a decentralized prediction market platform, and Chainlink, an oracle network, have announced an integration of the Chainlink data standard into Polymarket’s resolution process. The partnership will focus on enhancing the accuracy and speed of asset pricing resolutions. According to the announcement, the two companies are set to launch new 15-minute markets featuring near-instant settlement […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/polymarket-partners-with-chainlink-feature/

data.title: Solana gains momentum with institutional backing
data.description:

source: https://coinjournal.net/news/solana-gains-momentum-with-institutional-backing/

data.title: Trader Eugene: Closed SOL long position
